---
title: "Qualitative Phase Contrast Imaging using Interferometric 4DSTEM"
type: "article"
author: "A. Ducharme, P. Pelz, L. Brown, P. Ercius, B. McMorran"
year: "2022"
publication: "Microscopy and Microanalysis 28, 2504-2505"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1017/s1431927622009576"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
  - imaging
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 0
fwci: 0.00
citation_percentile: 9.4
is_oa: true
oa_status: bronze
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:15:23Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Qualitative Phase Contrast Imaging using Interferometric 4DSTEM
A. Ducharme, P. Pelz, L. Brown, P. Ercius, B. McMorran
Microscopy and Microanalysis 28, 2504-2505


## Abstract

Phase contrast imaging has been implemented inside the TEM column in the last decade at atomic resolution through differential phase contrast (DPC) and ptychography [1-2]. This imaging mode has higher contrast than more direct TEM imaging techniques, unlocking measurements of low Z and 2D materials and nanoscale electric fields [3-4]. Another route to phase contrast imaging is through structuring the electron beam prior to sample interaction, such as in MIDI-STEM [5]
